query:
SELECT 
  GROUP_CONCAT(c.title ORDER BY lpc.orderIndex SEPARATOR ', ') as courses
FROM learning_paths lp
LEFT JOIN learning_path_courses lpc ON lp.id = lpc.pathId
LEFT JOIN courses c ON lpc.courseId = c.id
WHERE lp.id = 1
